message:
feat(sync): Improve token freshness detection and SSH discovery

Enhances the sync subsystem with better token freshness detection and
more robust SSH config parsing:

Token Freshness:
- Add support for Claude's new .credentials.json format (preferred over
  legacy .claude.json) with proper expiresAt field parsing
- Handle unknown expiry gracefully by falling back to modification time
- Improve CompareFreshness() to handle zero-value expiry times correctly

SSH Discovery:
- Support multiple host patterns per line (e.g., "Host foo bar baz")
- Strip inline comments from SSH config lines
- Skip negated hosts (e.g., "!pattern") and wildcards properly
- Return all valid machines from multi-host declarations

Algorithm:
- Minor cleanup and test improvements for sync algorithm
- Better handling of edge cases in autosync

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
